content_body: We had a great family getaway. We kept getting lost on the way to all our hikes....went to Cabbage Patch Hospital, ate lunch in Helen, relaxed in the hot tub, toured Main Street, Atlanta Aquarium, Coca Cola Museum. Hit up Trader Joe's for "Two Buck Chuck" night! Not too much wildlife, a few deer and wild turkeys but that is about it. Loved the fireplace, nice and cozy!! All in all, great time relaxing.  Wish the weather was a little nicer, but what can you do.
title: Family Getaway to North Georgia
